name: Moscow Idaho Bakers
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Cooked ham, cut into julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
Pierce potatoes in several places with a fork. Set potatoes on an oven rack and bake at 400°F until potatoes give readily when squeezed, about 1 hour.
Meanwhile, melt butter in a 1-1/2 to 2 quart pan over medium-high heat. Add onion and stir often until limp, about 5 minutes. Mix milk with cornstarch and stir into the pan along with buttermilk and Marsala wine. Stir over medium-high heat until boiling. Add cheese and stir until melted. Stir in ham, mustard, and horseradish; if sauce is ready before potatoes are done baking, set aside.
To serve, split potatoes lengthwise and fluff centers with a fork. Set 2 halves on each plate and spoon sauce onto the potatoes. Sprinkle with chopped parsley; season to taste with salt and pepper.
